description: Simple demonstration module configuration. Customize the greeting message and display options.

fields.name: greeting_message
fields.label: Greeting Message
fields.help: The message displayed by this module.
fields.default: Hello from the Hello World module!

fields.name: greeting_color
fields.label: Greeting Color
fields.help: The color used for the greeting text.

fields.name: show_timestamp
fields.label: Show Timestamp
fields.checkbox_label: Display current date and time with greeting
fields.help: Shows when the module was loaded.

fields.name: position
fields.label: Display Position
fields.help: Where to display the greeting message.

fields.name: custom_css
fields.label: Custom CSS
fields.help: Add custom CSS styles for the greeting.
